data.name: Crimson Quest
data.detailed_description:
Crimson Quest blends the addictive gameplay of match-3 with RPG elements and turn-based combat. Each Archon has unique abilities and mechanics. By breaking through their defenses, you unlock exclusive adult scenes that reveal the most intense side of these guardians.

In the heart of a world shrouded in mist, a colossal dome rises, home to the enigmatic Archons, powerful women searching for a habitable planet. Dragged into this realm, your only chance of survival is to face them in battles of wit and desire.

Prepare yourself for an experience that goes beyond a simple puzzle:

・Match-3 battles with unique mechanics
・Grow stronger with each upgrade, gaining access to new abilities and enhanced power
・Archons come to life with animations and removable outfits during battles
・Adult scenes unlocked by exploiting each Archon’s weaknesses
・A mystery that ties the Archons to the fate of entire worlds

Redemption or destruction? The fate of the Archons is in your hands.

data.short_description: Crimson Quest is an adult match-3 with unique RPG mechanics. Face the Archons inside the mysterious dome and unlock intense scenes with every battle.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics card compatible with DirectX 9 (Intel HD Graphics or equivalent)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
